subject: FW: FW: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Hi Ayrton I work in the Dispute Resolution team headed up by Ryan Solomons. I just tried your mobile and left a message. Please call me on 0477 065 871. Yours faithfully Jon‑Paul Selfe Special Counsel
